title: Cloud HA Architecture Plan — Input Schema
description: Input parameters for the cloud-ha-architecture-plan babysitter process.

projectIdentifier.description: Cloud project or account identifier (e.g., GCP project ID, AWS account ID, Azure subscription ID).

cloudProvider.description: Cloud provider. Determines CLI commands, pricing models, and which diagram skill to use.

budgetCeiling.description: Maximum monthly budget in USD for all HA improvements.

currentArchitecture.description: Description of the current cloud infrastructure to audit.

services.description: List of current services with their configurations.

region.description: Current region where this service runs.

description.description: Free-text description of the current architecture, known issues, and context.

outputDir.description: Directory where diagram files will be saved.

generateCurrentState.description: Generate a diagram of the current architecture.

generateTargetState.description: Generate a diagram of the target HA architecture.

compositionPattern.description: Which phases to execute. full-pipeline runs all 8 phases. audit-only runs phase 1. design-and-plan runs phases 1-5. diagrams-only runs phase 6.
